docs.title: System Media Storage Policy
docs.storage_controls: Backup tapes and removable media are stored in a locked, access-controlled media safe within the primary data centre cage; printed system output is stored in locked cabinets.
docs.media_inventory: A media inventory is maintained in the asset register and reconciled quarterly; each item is bar-coded and logged on check-in and check-out.
docs.access_restrictions: Access to stored media is restricted to the IT operations team via badge and safe combination, reviewed quarterly.
